dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui.items

Class Item.WrappedInventoryClickEvent<T extends dev.triumphteam.gui.guis.BaseGui,S extends IStorage>

  • java.lang.Object
    • dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui.items.Item.WrappedInventoryClickEvent<T,S>
  • Type Parameters:
    T - The type of the gui
    Enclosing class:
    Item<T extends dev.triumphteam.gui.guis.BaseGui,S extends IStorage>

    public static class Item.WrappedInventoryClickEvent<T extends dev.triumphteam.gui.guis.BaseGui,S extends IStorage>
extends Object
    Wrapped event for the InventoryClickEvent. Adding access to the gui, local storage and some utils.

    Since:
    1.5
